summary: Tested iteration 26 bug fixes: (1) Details toggle on Stamp Approvals page - WORKING (expand/collapse on click), (2) Badge loading spinner next to PENDING badge - IMPLEMENTED (Loader2 spinner shows while delta is computed), (3) Current Stock loading skeleton - WORKING (shows skeleton cards during load), (4) Backend inventory caching - WORKING (responses under 1s), (5) DB indexes - VERIFIED via fast query times. All 6 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: toggleApprovalDetails() correctly implements toggle: checks if selectedEntry === detailKey, if so collapses (sets null), else expands
badgeLoading state properly managed: setBadgeLoading(true) before fetch, setBadgeLoading(false) in finally block
Loader2 spinner (h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin) shows next to PENDING badge when badgeLoading is true
CurrentStock loading skeleton uses animate-pulse class on Card components during loading state
InventoryCache class with 30s TTL implemented for expensive inventory computations
Comprehensive DB indexes created on startup for transactions, stock_entries, stamp_approvals collections
seed_data_creation: None - used existing STAMP 3 pending entries for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 26 fixes verified: Details toggle works (click to expand, click again to collapse), badge loading spinner implemented (Loader2 icon), Current Stock skeleton loading works, inventory caching with 30s TTL working. Two STAMP 3 entries remain pending in the system for future testing.
